app.name: Goyama
app.tagline: Your pocket agronomist for Sri Lanka

home.subtitle: Know what grows where you are, and how to grow it well.

crops.title: Crops
crops.search_placeholder: Search crops, e.g. brinjal, vambatu, kathirikkai
crops.empty: No crops match your search yet.

map.title: Sri Lanka on one map
map.subtitle: Tap any spot to see which agro-ecological zone it's in and what grows well there.
map.legend_tap_hint: Tap a zone to explore crops
map.popup_off_zone: You tapped outside the agro-ecological zones.
map.popup_placeholder_note: Approximate boundaries — NRMC polygons coming soon.
map.disclaimer: Zone boundaries on this map are sketchy hand-drawn approximations for the first UX pass. The canonical NRMC polygon dataset replaces them when the geospatial vectorisation workstream lands.

cultivation.heading: Cultivation calendar
cultivation.disclaimer: Draft guide — timings and inputs are sourced from DOA / HORDI publications and pending agronomist review.

errors.api_unreachable: Can't reach the Goyama service. Is it running on :8080?
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
